title: abutilon fruticosum
intro: Abutilon fruticosum, also known as the thorny custard tree or flowering okra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Abutilon fruticosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Abutilon fruticosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
